synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-28024 Important: Oracle Linux 8 Unbreakable Enterprise kernel security update
description:
[5.15.0-314.193.5.5]
- crypto: essiv - Check ssize for decryption and in-place encryption (Herbert Xu)  [Orabug: 38705933]  {CVE-2025-40019}
